2605.23243.title: Are Frontier LLMs Ready for Cybersecurity? Evidence for Vertical Foundation Models from Dual-Mode Vulnerability Benchmarks
2605.23243.paper_summary: We evaluate whether frontier LLMs are ready for cybersecurity through a dual-mode benchmark: white-box function-level vulnerability detection (VulnLLM-R, across C/Java/Python) and black-box web application security testing (five production-style applications with 118 ground-truth vulnerabilities across 20+ CWE families, which we will open-source). We test six frontier models (GPT-5.4, Codex~5.3, Claude Opus~4.6, Sonnet~4.6, Gemini~3.1~Pro and Gemini~3~Flash) and two domain-specialized models across four testing paradigms. Our findings are sobering: (1)~every frontier model produces 10-50% false positive rates in white-box detection, systematically over-predicting vulnerabilities; (2)~in black-box testing, frontier models achieve only 4-8% ground-truth coverage, improving to just 10-19% even with external security tools (Playwright MCP, Burp Suite MCP); (3)~structured penetration-testing methodology encoded in domain-specialized agents raises per-family detection above 50%, demonstrating that methodology, not scale, is the primary lever; and (4)~a domain-specialized defense model achieves the highest precision (0.904) and lowest false positive rate (9.7%) among all models, on a single GPU. We identify the absence of structured security testing traces end-to-end request/response sequences, failure-heavy data, and multi-step attack chains as the fundamental training data bottleneck, and propose self-play security testing as a data generation strategy. Our results make the case for vertical foundation models purpose-built for cybersecurity.
2605.23243.paper_summary_zh: 我們通過雙模式基準評估前沿 LLM 是否準備好應對網絡安全：白盒功能層級漏洞檢測（VulnLLM-R，涵蓋 C/Java/Python）和黑盒網絡應用安全測試（五個生產風格的應用程序，擁有 118 個真實漏洞，來自 20 多個 CWE 家族，我們將開源）。我們測試了六個前沿模型（GPT-5.4、Codex~5.3、Claude Opus~4.6、Sonnet~4.6、Gemini~3.1~Pro 和 Gemini~3~Flash）以及兩個領域專用模型，涵蓋四種測試範式。我們的發現令人警醒：（1）每個前沿模型在白盒檢測中產生 10-50% 的假陽性率，系統性地過度預測漏洞；（2）在黑盒測試中，前沿模型僅達到 4-8% 的真實覆蓋率，即使使用外部安全工具（Playwright MCP、Burp Suite MCP）也僅改善到 10-19%；（3）在領域專用代理中編碼的結構化滲透測試方法使每個家族的檢測率超過 50%，表明方法論而非規模是主要槓桿；（4）一個領域專用防禦模型在所有模型中實現了最高的精確度（0.904）和最低的假陽性率（9.7%），在單個 GPU 上運行。我們確定結構化安全測試缺乏端到端請求/響應序列、失敗重的數據和多步攻擊鏈是根本的訓練數據瓶頸，並提出自我對弈安全測試作為數據生成策略。我們的結果為專門為網絡安全構建的垂直基礎模型提供了論據。
2605.23243.author: Vivek Dahiya et.al.
2605.23243.authors: Vivek Dahiya, Sunny Nehra, Vipul Dholariya, Bhavik Shangari, Chandra Khatri
